input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.8.2.7 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.8.2.7
            TITLE: the charger must include a charger shutdown button which is:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.8.2.7: The Charger must include a Charger Shutdown Button which is:
EV.8.2.7 The Charger must include a Charger Shutdown Button which is: 
a. A push-pull or push-rotate emergency switch 
b. Minimum diameter of 25 mm  
c. Labelled with the international electrical symbol  (a red spark on a white edged blue 
triangle)

final_answer:
rule EV.8.2.7: The Charger must include a Charger Shutdown Button which is:
a. A push-pull or push-rotate emergency switch
b. Minimum diameter of 25 mm
c. Labelled with the international electrical symbol (a red spark on a white edged blue triangle)
